title: dimocarpus longan var. obtusus
intro: Dimocarpus longan var. obtusus, also known as the Longan tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to southern China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, edible fruits and fragrant flowers. The Longan tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, helping to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Dimocarpus longan var. obtusus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the Longan tree include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate a range of health issues, from digestive problems to respiratory infections.
